{{/*
  MediaWiki output template for Disorient Country Club wiki page.
  Generates MediaWiki markup from Hugo content files.

  Hugo will fail the build (via errorf) if required data is missing.
  See each section's comments for the expected frontmatter shape.
*/}}

{{/* --- Helper: render page body, stripping shortcodes and converting links to MediaWiki syntax --- */}}
{{- define "wiki-content" -}}
  {{- $raw := .RawContent | replaceRE `(?s)\{\{<[^>]*>\}\}` "" | replaceRE `(?s)\{\{%[^%]*%\}\}` "" -}}
  {{- $html := $raw | markdownify -}}
  {{- $find := "href=\"/" -}}
  {{- $repl := printf "href=\"%s" .Site.BaseURL -}}
  {{- $html = replace $html $find $repl -}}
  {{- $html = replaceRE `<a href="([^"]+)">([^<]+)</a>` "[$1 $2]" $html -}}
  {{- $html = replaceRE `</?p>` "" $html -}}
  {{- $html -}}
{{- end -}}

{{/* --- Page lookups --- */}}
{{- $home := . -}}
{{- $art := .Site.GetPage "/art" -}}
{{- $djs := .Site.GetPage "/lineup/djs" -}}
{{- $vjs := .Site.GetPage "/lineup/vjs" -}}
{{- $involved := .Site.GetPage "/get-involved" -}}
{{- $temple := .Site.GetPage "/temple" -}}
{{- $directions := .Site.GetPage "/guide/directions" -}}

{{/* --- Validate required pages exist --- */}}
{{- if not $art }}{{ errorf "Missing page: content/art/_index.md" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not $djs }}{{ errorf "Missing page: content/lineup/djs.md" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not $vjs }}{{ errorf "Missing page: content/lineup/vjs.md" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not $involved }}{{ errorf "Missing page: content/get-involved/_index.md" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not $directions }}{{ errorf "Missing page: content/guide/directions.md (create with driving, flying, bus, train, etc. content)" }}{{ end -}}

{{/* --- Validate required frontmatter on content/_index.md ---

  Expected frontmatter:

  event_number: "XIV"
  theme_name: "Presence and the Eternal Now"
  year: 2026
  dates: "Thu, May 21, NOON to Mon, May 25, NOON 2026"
  location: "Secret Location Upstate"
  location_detail: "Location released to ticket holders week of the event"
  overview: |
    Join Disorient for year 14 of our annual journey of deep chilling...
  theme_description: |
    An orderly return to chaos...
  hero_images:
    - file: "Ccxiv-hero.png"
      width: 550
  general_info:
    - "There is no vending at Country Club..."
    - "You may bring your pets..."
  areas_of_interest:
    - url: "https://example.com"
      text: "Description"
  mood_images:
    - "Image1.png"
    - "Image2.jpg"
  tshirt_image: "CCXivTshirt.png"
  escutcheon_images:
    - file: "CCXiv.Escutcheon.png"
      width: 250

*/}}
{{- if not .Params.event_number }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'event_number' (e.g. 'XIV')" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.theme_name }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'theme_name'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.year }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'year'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.dates }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'dates' (e.g. 'Thu, May 21, NOON to Mon, May 25, NOON 2026')" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.location }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'location'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.location_detail }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'location_detail'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.overview }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'overview'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.theme_description }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'theme_description'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.hero_images }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'hero_images' (array of {file, width})" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.general_info }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'general_info' (array of strings)" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.mood_images }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'mood_images' (array of image filenames)" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.tshirt_image }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'tshirt_image'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.escutcheon_images }}{{ errorf "_index.md: missing 'escutcheon_images' (array of {file, width})" }}{{ end -}}

{{/* --- Validate required links in data/links.yaml ---

  Expected fields:

  ticket: "https://events.humanitix.com/..."
  volunteer: "https://tinyurl.com/..."
  art_submission: "https://tinyurl.com/..."
  themecamp: "https://tinyurl.com/..."
  guide_submission: "https://tinyurl.com/..."
  art_car: "https://tinyurl.com/..."
  wiki: "http://wiki.disorient.info/..."
  survival_guide: "https://disorientcountry.club"

*/}}
{{- if not .Site.Data.links }}{{ errorf "Missing data file: data/links.yaml" }}{{ end -}}
{{- with .Site.Data.links -}}
{{- if not .ticket }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'ticket'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .volunteer }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'volunteer'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .art_submission }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'art_submission'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .themecamp }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'themecamp'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .guide_submission }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'guide_submission'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .art_car }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'art_car'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .wiki }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'wiki'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .survival_guide }}{{ errorf "data/links.yaml: missing 'survival_guide'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- end -}}

{{/* --- Validate required frontmatter on lineup pages ---

  Expected frontmatter on content/lineup/djs.md and vjs.md:

  artists:
    - name: "DJ NAME"
    - name: "ANOTHER DJ"
  lineup_image: "CCXiv_DJ_Lineup.jpg"
  lineup_image_width: 350

*/}}
{{/* --- Validate camps exist --- */}}
{{- $camps := where .Site.RegularPages "Section" "camps" -}}
{{- if not $camps }}{{ errorf "No camp pages found in content/camps/ (create .md files with title, tagline, hours, events)" }}{{ end -}}

{{/* --- Art adventures (optional) ---

  Expected files in content/art/:

  ---
  title: "Art Piece Name"
  creators: "Artist Name"
  wiki_link: "Optional_Wiki_Page_Name"
  ---

  Description of the art piece.

*/}}
{{- $artPages := where .Site.RegularPages "Section" "art" -}}

{{/* --- Temple page (optional) ---

  If content/temple/_index.md exists, it will be rendered.
  Expected frontmatter:

  ---
  title: "The Thirteenth"
  creators: "Geodesic Temple"
  wiki_link: "The_Thirteenth"
  temple_images:
    - file: "20250503.TheThirteenth.2.jpg"
      wiki_link: "The_Thirteenth"
      width: 370
  ---

*/}}
{{- with $temple -}}
{{- if not .Params.creators }}{{ errorf "temple/_index.md: missing 'creators'" }}{{ end -}}
{{- if not .Params.temple_images }}{{ errorf "temple/_index.md: missing 'temple_images' (array of {file, wiki_link, width})" }}{{ end -}}
{{- end -}}

{{/* ================================================================
     BEGIN MEDIAWIKI OUTPUT
     ================================================================ */}}
a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
{{ range .Params.hero_images -}}
[[Image:{{ .file }}|{{ .width }}px]] {{ end }}
==OVERVIEW==
{{ .Params.overview }}
<P>

Disorient presents: COUNTRY CLUB {{ .Params.event_number }} - {{ .Params.theme_name }}<BR>
{{ .Params.dates }} <BR>
{{ .Params.location }}<BR>
{{ .Params.location_detail }}<BR>

=={{ .Params.year }} THEME==
Disorient Country Club {{ .Params.year }} Theme: {{ .Params.theme_name }}<BR>
{{ .Params.theme_description }}
<BR>

==OUR ART + YOUR ART==
{{ with $art }}{{ template "wiki-content" . }}{{ end }}<BR>

==TICKETS==

{{ with .Site.Data.links -}}
TICKETS: {{ .ticket }}<BR>

VOLUNTEER: {{ .volunteer }}<BR>
SUBMIT ART: {{ .art_submission }}<BR>
THEMECAMPS PLACEMENT REQUEST: {{ .themecamp }}<BR>
SUBMIT EVENT OR WORKSHOP TO SURVIVAL GUIDE: {{ .guide_submission }}<BR>
ART CAR SUBMISSION: {{ .art_car }}<BR>

SURVIVAL GUIDE: {{ .survival_guide }}<BR>
DISORIENT WIKI: {{ .wiki }}<BR>
{{ with .facebook }}FACEBOOK: {{ . }}{{ end }}
{{- end }}

{{ with $djs }}{{ if .Params.artists }}
==DJ LINEUP==
{{ with .Params.lineup_image }}[[Image:{{ . }}|right|350px]]{{ end }}
{{ range .Params.artists -}}
{{ .name }}<br />
{{ end -}}
{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{ with $vjs }}{{ if .Params.artists }}
==VJ LINEUP==
{{ with .Params.lineup_image }}[[Image:{{ . }}|right|210px]]{{ end }}
{{ range .Params.artists -}}
{{ .name }}<br />
{{ end -}}
{{ end }}{{ end }}
==THEME CAMPS==
{{ range $camps }}{{ $pageTitle := .Title }}
==={{ with .Params.wiki_link }}[[{{ . }}|{{ $pageTitle }}]]{{ else }}{{ $pageTitle }}{{ end }}===
{{ template "wiki-content" . }}
{{ end }}
{{ if $artPages }}
==ART ADVENTURES==
{{ range $artPages }}{{ $pageTitle := .Title }}
==={{ with .Params.wiki_link }}[[{{ . }}|{{ $pageTitle }}]]{{ else }}{{ $pageTitle }}{{ end }}===
{{ with .Params.creators }}{{ . }}<br />{{ end }}
{{ template "wiki-content" . }}
{{ end }}
{{ end }}
{{ with $temple -}}
==TEMPLE==
{{ $pageTitle := .Title }}
{{ with .Params.wiki_link }}[[{{ . }}|{{ $pageTitle }}]]{{ else }}{{ $pageTitle }}{{ end }} by <I>{{ .Params.creators }}</I><BR>
{{ range .Params.temple_images -}}
[[Image:{{ .file }}|link={{ .wiki_link }}|{{ .width }}px]] {{ end }}<BR>
{{ template "wiki-content" . }}
{{- end }}

{{ with $directions }}{{ template "wiki-content" . }}{{ end }}

==GENERAL INFO==
{{ range .Params.general_info -}}
* {{ . }}<BR>
{{ end }}

{{ if .Params.areas_of_interest }}
==AREAS OF INTEREST==
{{ range .Params.areas_of_interest -}}
[{{ .url }} {{ .text }}]
<BR>
{{ end }}
{{ end }}

==MOODS==
<gallery heights=200 mode="packed-hover">
{{ range .Params.mood_images -}}
Image:{{ . }}
{{ end -}}
</gallery>

==T-SHIRT==
[[Image:{{ .Params.tshirt_image }}|240px]]

==ESCUTCHEON==
{{ range .Params.escutcheon_images -}}
[[Image:{{ .file }}|{{ .width }}px]] {{ end }}<BR>



a [[Country_Club|Disorient COUNTRY CLUB]] event<BR>
